description: A new customer calls, confused about their first bill which includes prorated charges.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and retrieve their first billing statement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the correct customer and bill.

nodes.task_description: Clearly explain the different parts of the bill: the prorated charge for the partial first month and the charge for the next full month in advance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a simple and clear explanation of prorated billing.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the customer understands and is satisfied with the explanation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures customer satisfaction before ending the call.
